name: Anomaly Detector • Work Order (Discrete)
description: Anomaly Detector • Work Order (Discrete) detects supplier ASNs and traces supplier ASNs snapshots; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via APS to prevent downtime.

steps.name: Order Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize downtime events from WMS; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Draft
steps.description: Execute draft phase for the Reflection pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Self-Critique
steps.description: Execute self-critique phase for the Reflection pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Replenishment
steps.description: Replenishment across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Setup Optimization
steps.description: Setup Optimization across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Defect Detection
steps.description: Defect Detection across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Traceability
steps.description: Traceability across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Maintenance Plan
steps.description: Maintenance Plan across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Quality Summary
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to APS; return response JSON for the client.
